steps.title: Recognize what the variables represent in m(t)
steps.content: The function $m(t)$ is defined with $t$ representing days after birth (input) and $m(t)$ representing body mass in kg (output). This assignment of variables is crucial for interpreting the given statement.

steps.title: Interpret m(315) approximately equal to 352 using the variable definitions
steps.content: Given that $m(315) \approx 352$, we identify: $t = 315$ (days after birth) is the input, and $m(315) \approx 352$ kg (body mass) is the output. Therefore, 315 days after it was born, the animal's predicted body mass was approximately 352 kg. B is correct.
